headline: Industry Leader Tom Alexander Joins The Pinnacle Group to Lead Expansion Into National Wirehouses
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 06, 2026--The Pinnacle Group announced today that Tom Alexander has joined the firm as National Director of Sales, marking a significant addition to its leadership team and continued investment in delivering high-level planning, support, and growth solutions to advisors and institutions nationwide.

headline: The Hartford To Host Virtual Annual Meeting Of Shareholders On May 20
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., May 06, 2026--The Hartford will host a virtual annual meeting of shareholders at 12:30 p.m. EDT on Wednesday, May 20.

headline: Is Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Hartford Insurance Group at around US$134 per share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in. The stock has recently seen a 3.3% decline over the last 7 days and is down 2.2% year to date, yet it still shows a 7.8% return over 1 year and over 100% across 3 and 5 years.
